title: Ship Crimson Compass Vertical Slice to itch.io
objective: Build, QA, and publish a playable 3-level Crimson Compass demo with 3 core spy gadgets to itch.io at $4.99 early access pricing by April 6, 2026.

approval_gate.note: Ship it. 3 gadgets is fine for v0.1.

sub_mandates.title: Build Crimson Compass 3-Level Vertical Slice
sub_mandates.description: Finalize 3 Unity levels with lockpick, scanner, and grapple gadgets. Produce Windows and WebGL builds. Run QA pass on both targets. Deliver build artifacts to BRS for itch.io upload.
success_criteria: WebGL build loads in Chrome and Firefox
Build artifacts delivered to BRS staging

sub_mandates.title: Publish Crimson Compass on itch.io
sub_mandates.description: Create itch.io listing with marketing copy, gameplay GIFs, screenshots, and pricing. Upload builds from NCC. Set early access pricing at $4.99. Configure payment to Resonance Energy account.
success_criteria: Marketing copy published with gameplay GIFs

sub_mandates.title: Configure DUBFORGE Revenue Earmark
sub_mandates.description: Set up revenue routing so all Crimson Compass itch.io earnings are tagged for DUBFORGE reinvestment per the 50/50 BRS/AAC split. AAC's 50% goes directly to DUBFORGE development fund.
success_criteria: Revenue earmark rule created in War Room
DUBFORGE tag applied to CC earnings stream
